body.notes:
Spun out from T-web-chat-reply-not-surfacing close 2026-04-19. Akien pointed out SWADL is now vendored (pip install -e /home/akien/dev/src/swadl, swadl-0.2.0) and CC can use it to instrument Igor's web pages for automated regression tests.

Shape:
- PageObject for http://localhost:8080/ chat UI — input box, send button, message list selectors.
- FlowObject: send_message_and_read_reply(text, timeout_sec=120) — posts, waits for a new igor-authored message with stable content, returns reply text.
- Test: assert non-empty reply lands in DOM within timeout. Run in CI hook after the UC server is up.
- Reference the concept anchors we seeded today (PAGE_OBJECT/FLOW_OBJECT/SELECTOR/IDEMPOTENCE) — this is Igor's first live use of the pedagogy.

Not blocking for any release. Owner: CC (can sprint when other work quiet).
body.title: SWADL-based automated smoke test for web-chat reply surfacing
body.result: SWADL smoke test shipped: page object + flow + test for localhost:8080 chat reply path. HTTP-level reachability probe (TCP-only false-passed on utility_closet_server squatting 8080). Skips in 0.11s, zero orphan browsers. Built by Haiku Agent dispatch + CC review.
body.description:
**Affected files:** wild_igor/tools/swadl_pages/web_chat.py (new page object for localhost:8080 chat UI); wild_igor/tools/swadl_flows/web_chat.py (send_message_and_read_reply flow); tests/test_web_chat_swadl_smoke.py.

**Design rules:** docs-in-code (selectors carry rationale); test-plan-or-why-not (this IS the test).

**Scope boundary:** IN — page object + flow object + smoke test. OUT — production CI integration (deferred); multi-message threading; auth flows.

**Test plan:** tests/test_web_chat_swadl_smoke.py — start UC chat server, post message, assert non-empty Igor reply within 120s. Skipped if UC server not reachable on localhost:8080.
